summary: Admin Panel Phase-1 testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional. RBAC enforcement verified: admin endpoints correctly return 403 for non-admin (operator) users and 401 for unauthenticated requests. System Health tab shows status banner, stats cards, role breakdown, and service status. Users tab shows paginated list with search/filter and inline role/facility editing. Facilities tab shows list with create/delete functionality.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <span> inside <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

System_Health_Endpoint.returns_services_status: PASS (DB connected, Cognito enabled, Google OAuth enabled)

frontend_ui.system_health_tab: PASS - Status banner, stats cards, role breakdown, services all displayed
frontend_ui.users_tab: PASS - User list with search input, role filter, edit buttons
frontend_ui.user_edit_panel: PASS - Role and Facility dropdowns appear
frontend_ui.facilities_tab: PASS - Facility list with add/delete buttons
frontend_ui.add_facility_form: PASS - Form with name, code, city, state, phone, email fields

critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: All endpoints correctly protected with require_role(['admin'])
Facility model correctly defined with code uniqueness constraint
RBAC middleware properly checks both Cognito groups AND local DB role
AdminPanel.jsx: Clean component structure with tabs for Health/Users/Facilities
FamilyDashboard sidebar correctly shows Admin Panel button only for admin-role users
Minor: React hydration warning for <span> inside <select> - cosmetic issue in dynamic rendering, non-blocking

test_credentials.operator_user: operator@Nagarik.com / operator123 (Cognito group: operator - correctly blocked from admin endpoints)

seed_data_creation: Test facilities with prefix TEST_, DEL_, ASSIGN_ created and auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel Phase-1 complete. System Health shows 25 users (1 admin, 23 guardian, 1 operator), 1 facility (NDC001 - Nagarik Delhi Care Center). User role/facility editing works. Facility CRUD works. RBAC enforcement verified - operator user gets 403 on all /api/admin/* endpoints. No mocked APIs.

verified_features.GET /api/admin/system-health: Working - returns healthy status, user/facility counts, services
verified_features.GET /api/admin/users: Working - paginated with role filter and search
verified_features.PUT /api/admin/users/{id}/role: Working - updates role with Cognito sync
verified_features.GET /api/admin/facilities: Working - lists facilities with user counts
verified_features.Admin_link_in_sidebar: Working - visible only for admin users
